title: getProvider(memberId) resolves per-member code-intel provider with global fallback
summary: getProvider() in src/tools/code-intelligence.ts looks up the Agent record via getAgent(memberId) and returns PROVIDERS[agent.codeIntelProvider]. Falls back to the global default ('codebase-memory') when memberId is omitted/empty, the agent is not found, or codeIntelProvider is unset -- preserving backward compatibility for existing single-provider setups.

title: NullProvider covers all 7 code-intel methods with structured disabled messages, never throws
summary: NullProvider (src/tools/code-intelligence.ts) implements CodeIntelProviderAdapter for members with codeIntelProvider='none'. Every method (query, callChain, impact, context, map, flow, tests) returns {success:false, provider:'none', message:'Code intelligence disabled for this member. ...'} instead of throwing, so downstream tool handlers can always JSON.stringify the result safely.

title: Member context threading: inFlightAgents-size heuristic + setActiveMember hook in src/index.ts
summary: resolveCodeIntelMember() in src/index.ts infers which member a code-intel tool call belongs to without adding memberId to any tool's zod schema. Priority: explicit getActiveMember() (set via setActiveMember, exported from code-intelligence.ts) first, then inFlightAgents.size===1 inference, else undefined (global fallback via getProvider()).
